ActivationResult.description:
Outcome of an activate/rollback: the now-active version + whether the
artifact was loaded into this process's in-memory registry.
ActivationResult.title: ActivationResult

AlertDetailOut.description: Alert plus its agent-decision audit trail and response actions.
AlertDetailOut.title: AlertDetailOut

AlertDisposition.description: Analyst verdict, orthogonal to the agent workflow status.
AlertDisposition.title: AlertDisposition

AlertTimeseriesPoint.description:
One time-bucket of alert counts, broken down by severity.

Fields use the same uppercase names as the ``Severity`` enum so the
frontend chart can key directly into them.
AlertTimeseriesPoint.title: AlertTimeseriesPoint

file.description: CSV file with one flow per row.
file.title: File

DailySummaryPacket.description: Daily roll-up — also stored in ``incident_reports.summary`` JSONB.
DailySummaryPacket.title: DailySummaryPacket

DashboardOverviewOut.description: Single payload powering the SOC dashboard's KPI cards + charts.
DashboardOverviewOut.title: DashboardOverviewOut

DriftReport.description: Envelope so the UI can distinguish 'no drift data' from an actual result.
DriftReport.title: DriftReport

DriftStatus.description: Drift severity bucket derived from the overall drift score.
DriftStatus.title: DriftStatus

ExecutionMode.description:
How a response action is carried out.

SIMULATED (default) never touches a real system. LAB permits a controlled,
allowlisted real effect via a lab executor — disabled unless explicitly
configured (see ``app.core.config`` response settings).
ExecutionMode.title: ExecutionMode

FlowBatchIn.description: Batch of flows posted by the live sensor to ``POST /api/v1/ingest/flows``.
FlowBatchIn.title: FlowBatchIn

IngestionSummary.description: Result of a single ingestion job.
IngestionSummary.title: IngestionSummary

InvestigationOut.description: Wraps the packet with the artifact id for traceability.
InvestigationOut.title: InvestigationOut

InvestigationPacket.description: Stored verbatim in ``alert_artifacts.data`` and returned by the API.
InvestigationPacket.title: InvestigationPacket

MeOut.description: Lightweight identity derived from the JWT (no DB lookup).
MeOut.title: MeOut

ReplayRequest.description:
Body for ``POST /api/v1/ingest/replay``.

``file`` is a path *relative to the ingest data directory*; absolute paths
or ``..`` traversal are rejected at the endpoint.
ReplayRequest.title: ReplayRequest

Role.description:
RBAC roles, lowest to highest privilege.

The workflow is read-only for VIEWER, full SOC operation for ANALYST, and
user management plus future dangerous actions for ADMIN. Privilege is a
total order (see ``ROLE_RANK``): a higher role satisfies any requirement a
lower role does.
Role.title: Role

SensorStatusOut.description:
Ingest-activity proxy for live-sensor liveness (the backend doesn't run
the sensor process itself).
SensorStatusOut.title: SensorStatusOut

TaskKind.description: Kind of background job tracked in the ``tasks`` table.
TaskKind.title: TaskKind

TriageOut.description: Audit-trail-friendly response from the triage endpoint.
TriageOut.title: TriageOut

UserOut.description: Full user record (admin views, /auth/me when DB-backed).
UserOut.title: UserOut

info.description: AI-driven intrusion detection and response dashboard.
info.title: SentinelAI

schema.title: Response List Alerts Api V1 Alerts Get

get.description:
Hourly alert counts for the last ``hours``, broken down by severity.

Empty buckets are zero-filled so the line chart has no gaps.
Return the most recent investigation packet for an alert (without re-running).
Return the most recent incident report for this alert (no re-generation).

post.description: Generate (and persist) an incident report for this alert.

schema.title: Response Logout Api V1 Auth Logout Post

post.description:
Revoke every session for the caller and invalidate all access tokens.

Bumps ``token_version`` so any still-valid access token is rejected on its
next protected request (see ``get_active_principal``).

schema.title: Response Logout All Api V1 Auth Logout All Post

post.description:
Rotate the refresh cookie and mint a new access token.

CSRF is enforced upstream by middleware (the request carries the refresh
cookie). Invalid/expired/revoked tokens clear cookies and return 401.
Deactivate a user: locks login, revokes sessions, invalidates tokens.
Admin reset of a locked-out account: clears the failure counter + lock.

get.description: One round trip for every KPI + chart aggregation the dashboard needs.

schema.title: Response Detect Many Api V1 Detection Batch Post
Response Predict Api V1 Detection Predict Post

post.description: Ingest a single flow record. Useful for live producers and tests.

Batch-ingest flows from the live sensor (Zeek/Suricata/pcap-replay).

Requires ANALYST+ (method-based RBAC) — the sensor authenticates with a
service/analyst JWT. When ``SENTINEL_DETECTION_AUTO_RUN_ON_INGEST`` is set,
detection runs on the freshly-queued events right after insert (bounded);
failures there never fail the ingest, which is already committed.

schema.title: Response List Jobs Api V1 Ingest Jobs Get

post.description:
Ingest a CSV that already lives under the server-side data dir.

The path must be relative; absolute paths and ``..`` traversal are rejected.

get.description: Live-sensor liveness proxy (recent ingest activity). VIEWER+.

post.description: Upload a CSV via multipart form-data and ingest it synchronously.

schema.title: Response List Shadow Evals Api V1 Models Shadow Get
Response List Reports Endpoint Api V1 Reports Get
Response Get Report Endpoint Api V1 Reports  Report Id  Get
Response List Response Actions Api V1 Response Get
Response List Pending Actions Api V1 Response Pending Get

post.description: Revert an executed LAB action whose effect is still in place (ANALYST+).
